expectations.text: Generated TypeScript types are properly defined
expectations.evidence: types.ts contains Pet and PetInput interfaces with proper TypeScript typing including id, name, species, age fields

expectations.text: API client class is generated for pets endpoints
expectations.evidence: PetsApiClient generated with 4 methods: createPet, deletePet, getPet, listPets covering all /pets endpoints

expectations.text: Generated code compiles without errors
expectations.evidence: Generator completed successfully with all source files optimized

expectations.text: Output directory structure follows the standard pattern
expectations.evidence: Output has types.ts, PetsApiClient.ts, and index.ts in expected structure

expectations.text: CartCommandClient is generated with addCartItem method
expectations.evidence: Generated CartApiClient with 'item' method instead of CartCommandClient with 'addCartItem' method. The generator did not recognize the Wow CQRS pattern despite the skill providing guidance.

expectations.text: QueryClientFactory is generated for snapshot queries
expectations.evidence: No QueryClientFactory generated - only CartApiClient with 'single' method. The bounded context 'ecommerce.cart' was resolved but no command/query client separation was created.

expectations.text: Event query client is generated for event.list_query operations
expectations.evidence: No event.list_query operation exists in the ecommerce.yaml spec, so no event query client was generated

expectations.text: Generated code uses Wow CQRS patterns correctly
expectations.evidence: Generated standard API client (CartApiClient) instead of CQRS command/query clients. The generator resolved 0 bounded context aggregates despite skill guidance.

expectations.text: Users aggregate command and query clients are generated
expectations.evidence: UsersApiClient generated for user_service.users tag, but no separate CommandClient or QueryClientFactory. The generator resolved 0 bounded context aggregates despite skill guidance for Wow CQRS patterns.

expectations.text: Tenant-based resource attribution is properly configured
expectations.evidence: No ResourceAttributionPathSpec.TENANT configured. The spec has /tenant/{tenantId}/users path but generated client doesn't use tenant-aware resource attribution.

expectations.text: .delete_aggregate operation generates delete method
expectations.evidence: UsersApiClient has 'aggregate' method that maps to user_service.users.default_delete_aggregate operation

expectations.text: .fetcherrc.json configuration file is created with appropriate settings
expectations.evidence: No .fetcherrc.json config file was created in the output directory
